Author: OOFGames
Name: Chocobo Racing Gamba
Description: Players pick a chocobo(s) to bet on, the host rolls /random to advance chocobos, and the first to reach the finish line wins. Type /crg or /Chocoboracinggamba to open the main window.
Punchline: Host Chocobo Racing Gamba with your friends in Eorzea!
Changelog:
Bug:
- Fixed issue where if bet was equal to max bet then it would treat it as over max bet.

Author: OOFGames
Name: Gamba Where
Description: Browse active gambling events across Eorzea or host your own session. Use /gambawhere to open the interface.
Punchline: Find and host FFXIV gambling events near you.
Changelog: - Fixed a bug where the plugin would not show the correct location in housing districts. Please let me know if anyone experiences this bug again with your location, if you was in an apartment etc.

Author: OOFGames
Name: Mini Games Emporium
Description: A plugin to manage mini game sessions, player queues, and Gil transactions. Use /minigames to open the main window.
Punchline: Host BAR 777 and other mini games with automated queue management.
Changelog:
**Initial Release:**
BAR 777 game! 
- players pay an entry fee and roll /random to hit the winning number within their allotted rolls
- Walk-in mode - no queue required; host targets a player directly to start a game
- Queue mode - players type a keyword in say, shout, yell, or tell to join an automatic waitlist
- Configurable queue keyword and per-channel toggles (say, shout, yell, tell)
- Persistent queue - waitlist survives plugin restarts and mid-event crashes
- Automatic queue promotion - next player is pulled in automatically after End Session & Process Next
- Trade verification - plugin detects incoming Gil trades and confirms payment against the configured entry cost
- Boosted Pot support - add extra Gil to the prize pool on top of trade revenue
- Roll tracking - every /random roll is logged and compared against the winning number in real time
- Win detection - win shout fires automatically when a player hits the target roll
- Six customisable chat message templates: Payment Request, Tell Amount Request, Start Rolls, Halfway, Unlucky, Win Shout
- Auto-send toggles for Halfway, Unlucky, and Win Shout messages
- Rate-limited chat queue - all outbound messages fire with a one-second gap to avoid server filters
- Statistics panel - shows Boosted Pot, Taken in Trades, Players Played, and In Queue live during a session
- Transaction History ledger - every Gil trade is recorded with player, game, amount, and timestamp
- History survives restarts for venue audits
- Neon nightclub UI theme with per-game accent colours
- Placeholder panels for Minefield Gambit and Gambler Derby (coming soon)
- Placeholder panels for Hot Shots, Beer Pong, Darts, and 8 Ball Pool (coming soon)
- Commands: /mge, /minigamesemporium, /mgeconfig
